items.title: King Charles' visit to US goes ahead despite Washington shooting
items.summary: King Charles' state visit to the U.S. will go ahead as planned on ​Monday despite a shooting at a White House dinner attended by President Donald Trump, Buckingham Palace said after discussions with U.S. officials. The four-day trip - which is to include a private meeting with Trump and an address to Congress marking 250 years since U.S. independence — is intended to reinforce the strained U.S.-British relationship ‌amid differences over the Iran war.

items.title: Investigators probe motives of US press gala shooting suspect

items.title: Trump calls suspect in press dinner attack 'pretty sick guy'
items.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump said on Sunday that the suspect accused of trying to attack administration officials at a ​black-tie gala on Saturday night was a "pretty sick guy" who had been flagged to law enforcement by family members. Trump said in TV interviews that the suspect, whom an official identified as 31-year-old Cole Tomas Allen, of Torrance, California, had posted what Trump described as an "anti-Christian" manifesto.

items.title: Kim reaffirms North Korean support for Russia's 'sacred' Ukraine war
items.summary: North Korean leader Kim Jong-un reaffirmed support for Russia's invasion of Ukraine and vowed to help Moscow achieve victory in its "sacred war", state media reported Monday, after Russian Defence Minister Andrey Belousov met with Kim on Sunday. Pyongyang has sent missiles, munitions and thousands of troops to assist Russia in Ukraine, and analysts say Moscow is sending financial aid, military technology, food and energy to the diplomatically isolated country in return.

items.title: Kenya's Sabastian Sawe becomes first man to run a marathon in under two hours
items.summary: Kenyan athlete Sabastian Sawe entered the history books by becoming the first man to run a marathon in under two hours. He won the London race in 1 hour, 59 minutes, and 30 seconds.

items.title: China warns EU over ‘Made in Europe’ plan, vows countermeasures
items.summary: China on Monday criticised European Union plans to shield key industries from Chinese competition, warning it would take countermeasures if the measures are adopted. The EU’s proposed “Made in Europe” rules would require companies seeking public funds in sectors including cars, green technology and steel to meet local content thresholds.

items.title: Middle East war live: Putin receives Iran’s foreign minister amid stalled US-Iran talks
items.summary: Russian President Vladimir Putin plans to meet with Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi on Monday, Russian state media reported. Moscow and Tehran, which are both subject to heavy Western sanctions, have developed an increasingly close relationship in recent years. Follow our liveblog for the latest updates.

items.title: Elon Musk’s lawsuit against OpenAI over nonprofit claims heads to trial
items.summary: Tech billionaire Elon Musk’s lawsuit accusing OpenAI of abandoning its non-profit mission on Monday advances with jury selection in California. The case pits the world’s richest person against a startup he once backed and now rivals in the artificial intelligence sector.

items.title: King Charles III begins US visit despite press gala shooting, transatlantic tensions
items.summary: Britain's King Charles III and Queen Camilla began a four-day visit to the United States on Monday to honour historic ties between the two countries as the US marks its 250th anniversary. The trip will take place despite simmering transatlantic tensions over the Iran war, and a shooting two days earlier at a dinner attended by US President Donald Trump.

items.title: Mali : les rebelles touareg disent contrôler Kidal après un accord avec les Russes
items.summary: La situation reste instable et confuse ce lundi 27 avril après une série d’attaques coordonnées menées samedi par les jihadistes du JNIM, un groupe lié à Al-Qaïda et des rebelles touareg, sur plusieurs villes, dont Bamako. Le ministre de la Défense, figure clef du régime militaire, a été tué. Les rebelles touaregs ont déclaré dimanche avoir conclu un "accord" permettant aux soldats russes de l'Africa Corps de se retirer de la ville de Kidal, dans le nord du Mali.

translation.title: Mali: Tuareg rebels claim control of Kidal after agreement with Russians
translation.summary: The situation remains unstable and confused this Monday, 27 April after a series of coordinated attacks by JNIM jihadists, a group linked to Al-Qaeda and Tuareg rebels, on several cities, including Bamako, on Saturday. The Minister of Defence, a key figure in the military regime, was killed. Tuareg rebels declared on Sunday that they had entered into a "agreement" allowing Russian African Corps soldiers to withdraw from Kidal town in northern Mali.

items.title: Elon Musk poursuit Sam Altman : le grand procès de l'IA
items.summary: Un tribunal fédéral californien accueille la sélection du jury qui doit examiner l'affaire intentée par Elon Musk contre un autre capitaine de l'industrie IA américaine, Sam Altman. Le premier accuse le second d'avoir trahi la vocation non lucrative d'OpenAI qu'ils ont créé ensemble. Derrière ce duel, une question fondamentale : qui doit contrôler l'intelligence artificielle, et au profit de qui ?

translation.title: Elon Musk pursues Sam Altman: AI's grand trial
translation.summary: A Californian federal court welcomes the selection of the jury to consider the case brought by Elon Musk against another captain of the American AI industry, Sam Altman. The former accuses the latter of betraying the non-profit vocation of OpenAI that they created together. Behind this duel, a fundamental question: who must control artificial intelligence, and for whose benefit?

items.title: En Syrie, ouverture du procès contre Bachar al-Assad et des figures clés de son clan
items.summary: Le procès du président syrien déchu Bachar al-Assad et de membres de son clan s'est ouvert dimanche dans un tribunal de Syrie. Lors de cette première audience a comparu, menotté et en tenue rayée de prisonnier, Atef Najib, ancien chef de la sécurité politique à Deraa (sud), accusé d'y avoir mené une vaste campagne de répression et d'arrestations lors du soulèvement de 2011. Bachar al-Assad et son frère Maher, qui ont fui la Syrie après leur chute en décembre 2024, seront jugés par contumace.

translation.title: In Syria, trial opened against Bashar al-Assad and key figures of his clan
translation.summary: The trial of the fallen Syrian President Bashar al-Assad and members of his clan opened on Sunday in a Syrian court. During this first hearing, Atef Najib, a former head of political security in Deraa (south), appeared, handcuffed and in prison striped uniform accused of carrying out an extensive campaign of repression and arrests during the 2011 uprising. Bashar al-Assad and his brother Maher, who fled Syria after their fall in December 2024, will be tried in absentia.

translation.summary: Press coverage on Monday: the still very unstable situation in Mali following the attacks this weekend of the GSIM jihadists, allied to the northern independenceists; the beginning of the State visit of King Charles III to the United States for the 250 years of American independence; a much awaited meeting at the National Assembly in France; a Kenyan exploit; and the world king of marmalade.

items.title: Situation sécuritaire critique au Mali, le point par notre correspondant régional
items.summary: "Selon nos informations, les rebelles du FLA contrôlent toute la ville de Kidal (...) Les autorités civiles sont parties", rapporte le correspondant régional de France 24, Serge Daniel. À Gao, principale ville du Nord, les habitants ont vu des drones dans le ciel. Au centre, à Sévaré, les rebelles ont été vus. Des combats ont été observés dans le sud, à Kati. "Les populations sont inquiètent car elles ne savent pas ce qu'il se passe et ce qu'il va se passer."

translation.title: Critical security situation in Mali, the point by our regional correspondent
translation.summary: "According to our information, the rebels of the FLA control the entire city of Kidal (...) The civilian authorities are gone," reports France 24 regional correspondent Serge Daniel. In Gao, the main northern city, the inhabitants saw drones in the sky. In the center, in Sévaré, the rebels were seen. Fighting was observed in the south in Kati. "People are worried because they don't know what's going on and what's going to happen."

items.title: La visite de Charles III à la Maison Blanche maintenue malgré l'attaque au gala de la presse
items.summary: Le roi Charles III et la reine Camilla effectuent leur première visite d'État aux États-Unis, dès lundi, à l'occasion du 250ᵉ anniversaire de l'indépendance américaine. Malgré l'attaque lors du gala des correspondants, la visite "se déroulera comme prévu", selon Buckingham. En pleine crispation diplomatique, le souverain britannique doit prononcer un discours devant le Congrès américain, mardi.

translation.title: Charles III's visit to the White House continued despite the attack at the press gala
translation.summary: King Charles III and Queen Camilla made their first state visit to the United States on Monday to mark the 250th anniversary of American independence. Despite the attack during the gala of correspondents, the visit "will take place as planned", according to Buckingham. In the midst of diplomatic tension, the British sovereign is to deliver a speech before the American Congress on Tuesday.

items.title: 镜观·足迹｜呵护千山万水 擘画永续发展
items.summary: 大美中国，江山如画。 党的十八大以来，习近平总书记的考察足迹遍及神州大地。祁连山麓、坝上林海，秦岭深处、黄河之滨，总书记在大江奔涌处谋划千秋大计，在山川锦绣间擘画生态蓝图。一系列重要论述，为新时代生态文明建设提供了根本遵循和行动指南。  世界环境日到来之际，我们跟随习近平总书记的脚步，一起呵护山水、寄情山水，领悟守护绿水青山、建设生态文明之道。  江河为脉 心系长江之变，习近平总书记前往沿江重镇，考察长江经济带发展。从三峡库区到洞庭湖畔，从港口码头到企业车间，总书记深入调研，作出一系列重要指示，为新时代江河保护治理提供了重要遵循。  2018年4月，习近平总书记来到湖南岳阳城陵矶水文站考察。在狭窄的站房外长廊上，习近平总书记举目远眺。“共抓大保护，不搞大开发”的战略定力，在这里化作守护一江碧水的坚定行动。  2023年10月10日下午，习近平总书记在江西九江市考察，冒雨在江边察看，了解当地长江国家文化公园建设、长江岸线生态修复等情况。10月12日，总书记在进一步推动长江经济带高质量发展座谈会上回顾长江经济带发展历程，感慨：“做就要做好，坚定做下去。笃行不怠，一以贯之，久久为功。” 黄河

The Secretary-General of the Qin Ridge and the Yellow River are planning a thousand-year-olds at the flood of the great river, drawing an ecological blueprint in the mountains. items.title: 学习手记 | “环境就是民生”
items.summary: 6月5日是世界环境日，也是我国环境保护法确立的环境日。 22年前的这一天，在时任浙江省委书记习近平部署推动下，以农村人居环境整治为重点的“千万工程”启动。 当时，习近平同志担任浙江省委书记刚半年多，工作千头万绪。他何以将农村人居环境整治作为重点工作？ 在基层调研时，习近平同志发现，在浙江经济快速发展的同时，广大农村却面临“成长的烦恼”，村庄面貌不如人意。 全省3.4万个村庄中，人居环境较好的仅4000个。有人形容：“走过一村又一村，村村都是垃圾村。”还有农民这样描述：“起早贪黑赚钞票，垃圾堆里数钞票，躺在医院花钞票。”可以说，人居环境整治是当时浙江农村群众的一个迫切期盼。 “千万工程”聚焦乡亲们走什么村道、怎么处理畜禽粪便等小问题，却直接关系农民获得感、幸福感，是实打实的民生大事。 老百姓的生活环境如何，习近平同志念兹在兹： 上世纪70年代，在陕北冯家坪公社赵家河大队驻点时，他撸起袖管，一石一瓦盖起村里第一个男女分开的厕所； 到正定工作，不仅大力推进“人拉猪吃”的“连茅圈”改造工作，还拿着大扫帚走上街头搞卫生，推动成立全县第一支专职卫生清洁队； 任福州市委书记，亲自为建造垃圾处理场选址

translation.summary: 5 June is World Environment Day and the environmental day established by our environmental protection laws. Twenty-two years ago, with the deployment of Xi Jinping, then Secretary-General of Zhejiang Province, the “millions of projects” focusing on the environmental rehabilitation of rural settlements were launched. At that time, Comrade Xi had been the secretary of the Zhejiang province for more than six months and had been working for a long time. Out of 34,000 villages in the province, only 4,000 have a better habitat. It was described as “a village after a village, which is full of garbage”. And the farmers described it as: “Getting up early and making money, counting it in the trash, spending it in the hospital.” It can be said that the remediation of the habitat environment was an urgent aspiration of the rural population of Zhejiang at the time. items.title: 刘国中在安徽调研时强调 全力以赴夺取夏粮丰收 全面打牢秋粮生产基础
items.summary: 新华社合肥6月5日电 中共中央政治局委员、国务院副总理刘国中3日至5日到安徽调研“三夏”农业生产工作。他强调，要深入学习贯彻习近平总书记关于国家粮食安全的重要论述，按照党中央、国务院部署，扛稳政治责任，毫不放松抓好夏收夏种夏管，全力以赴夺取夏粮丰收，全面打牢秋粮生产基础，确保完成全年粮食生产目标任务。 刘国中先后来到宿州市、淮南市、六安市，深入小麦机收和夏播现场、农机跨区作业服务点、农事服务中心、粮食仓储中心、地方农科院等，实地察看夏收夏种、农机作业服务保障、粮食烘干收储等工作，详细了解农作物新品种选育、大面积单产提升、农资保供稳价、高标准农田建设等情况。 刘国中强调，“三夏”工作抓得好不好，事关全年粮食生产目标任务能否顺利实现。当前正值“三夏”农业生产关键时期，要抓住有利天气抢晴收获，组织好农机跨区作业，强化服务保障和安全管理，确保夏收高效进行。要抓实抓牢机收减损、烘干晾晒等各项措施，最大程度减少粮食损失。要精心做好夏粮收购工作，引导各类企业积极入市，保障粮食市场平稳运行。要压茬推进夏播，加强农资供应和农事服务，强化技术集成及推广应用，落实落细合理密植、精量播种等大面积单产提升措施，

items.title: 韩正会见中美高级别二轨对话美方代表团
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 6月5日，国家副主席韩正在北京会见中美高级别二轨对话美方代表团。 韩正表示，中美关系是当今世界最重要的双边关系之一。当前，中美关系处于关键历史节点。中美相互尊重、和平共处、合作共赢，不仅有利于两国，也有利于世界和平与发展。希望中美高级别二轨对话能不断汇聚两国有识之士的真知灼见，增进美国各界对中国的了解和理解，共同推动中美关系稳定、健康、可持续发展。 美方表示，美中高级别二轨对话有助于双方更好理解对方，为两国关系发展提供更多有益思路。中国经济发展令人钦佩，双方应加强贸易、投资等领域对话合作。

translation.title: Han is meeting with the United States delegation to the High-level Second Track Dialogue between China and the United States
translation.summary: On 5 June, the Vice-President of Xinhua, Han, met in Beijing with the United States delegation to the High-level Second Track Dialogue between China and the United States. Han is saying that Chinese-American relations are one of the most important bilateral relations in the world today. Currently, US-China relations are at a critical historical node. Mutual respect, peaceful coexistence and co-operation between China and the United States are beneficial not only to both countries but also to world peace and development. It is to be hoped that the high-level second-track dialogue between China and the United States will continue to bring together the insights of knowledgeable people from the two countries, enhance understanding and understanding of China among the United States, and work together to promote stable, healthy and sustainable relations between China and the United States. The United States side stated that the two sides would benefit from a better understanding of each other and from more useful ideas for the development of their relations. China ' s economic development was admirable, and the two sides should strengthen dialogue and cooperation in the areas of trade and investment.

items.title: 国务院印发《关于开展第四次全国农业普查的通知》
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电　国务院日前印发《关于开展第四次全国农业普查的通知》（以下简称《通知》）。根据《中华人民共和国统计法》和《全国农业普查条例》规定，国务院决定于2026年开展第四次全国农业普查。 　　《通知》强调，第四次全国农业普查是在以中国式现代化全面推进中华民族伟大复兴的新征程上开展的一项重大国情国力调查，要以习近平新时代中国特色社会主义思想为指导，深入贯彻党的二十大和二十届二中、三中全会精神，认真落实党中央、国务院决策部署，坚持依法普查、科学普查、为民普查，坚持实事求是、守正创新，全面摸清新时代我国“三农”家底，客观反映农业发展新情况、乡村建设新面貌、农民生活新变化、农村改革新成效。 　　《通知》指出，第四次全国农业普查的对象是在中华人民共和国境内的农村住户，包括农村农业生产经营户和其他住户；城镇农业生产经营户；农业生产经营单位；村民委员会；乡镇人民政府。普查的主要内容包括农业生产条件、粮食和大食物生产情况、农业新质生产力情况、乡村发展基本情况、农村居民生活情况等。普查的标准时点为2026年12月31日24时，时期资料为2026年年度资料。 　　《通知》要求，各地区、各部门要按

The Circular stressed that the Fourth National Agricultural Census was a major national survey on the new quest for a comprehensive revival of the Chinese nation through China's modernization, guided by the Chinese socialist ideology of Xi Jinping's new era, and guided by the spirit of the 20th and 20th China-China Congresses, and by the serious implementation of the Party's central and State Council's decision-making process. It was determined that the census should be conducted in accordance with the law, that the scientific census should be conducted and that the census should be conducted for the people's census, that it should be carried out in accordance with the law, that it should be carried out in a realistic and innovative manner, and that the “three farmers” of the new era should be thoroughly examined in order to objectively reflect new developments in agricultural development, new aspects of rural construction, new changes in rural life and new effects of rural reform. The Circular states that the Fourth National Agricultural Survey is aimed at rural households in the People ' s Republic of China, including rural agricultural producers and other households; urban agricultural producers; agricultural production units; villagers ' committees; and town and town people ' s governments. The main elements of the census include agricultural production conditions, food and food production, new quality of agricultural productivity, basics of rural development, living conditions of rural residents, etc. The standard time of the census is 2400 hours on 31 December 2026, and the data for the period is annual 2026. items.title: 中央军委主席习近平签署命令 发布《军事设施建设条例》
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 中央军委主席习近平日前签署命令，发布《军事设施建设条例》，自2025年8月1日起施行。 条例深入贯彻习近平强军思想，深入贯彻新时代军事战略方针，聚焦服务备战打仗，适应新的领导指挥体制和保障模式，科学规范军事设施建设的基本原则、管理体制、运行机制和工作制度，是军事设施建设工作的重要依据。 条例共11章63条，按照军委管总、战区主战、军种主建的总原则，围绕理顺建设链、管理链、监督链，重点从军事设施建设计划管理、项目审批、工程发包、勘察设计、施工管理、应急建设、安全保密、监督问责等方面，厘清管理权限，优化流程机制，固化实践成果，为提高军事设施建设质量效益和保障能力提供有力法治保障。

translation.title: The President of the Central Military Commission, Xi Jinping, signed an order to issue regulations on the construction of military installations
translation.summary: Xinhua News Agency, Beijing, 5 June The regulations further implement Xi Jinping ' s military doctrine, the strategic military approach of the new era, the focus on service preparation for combat, the adaptation of the new model of command and control, and the scientific regulation of the basic principles of the construction of military facilities, the regulatory framework, the operational mechanisms and the working system, are important bases for the construction of military facilities. In accordance with the general principles of the Military Commission ' s General Administration, the main war zone and military construction, the regulations provide for the clarification of management competencies, the optimization of process mechanisms, the consolidation of practical results and the provision of robust rule of law guarantees for the quality and safety of military facilities, in accordance with the general principles of the Military Commission, chapter 11, section 63, and the streamlining of the construction chain, the management chain and the chain of supervision, with emphasis on the management of the military facilities construction plan, project approval, engineering contracting, survey design, construction management, emergency response, security confidentiality and oversight accountability.

items.title: 中共中央办公厅印发《党组讨论和决定党员处分事项工作程序规定》
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电　近日，中共中央办公厅印发《党组讨论和决定党员处分事项工作程序规定》，并发出通知，要求各地区各部门认真遵照执行。 　　《党组讨论和决定党员处分事项工作程序规定》全文如下。 　　党组讨论和决定党员处分事项工作程序规定 　　（2018年11月29日中共中央批准　2018年11月29日中共中央办公厅发布　2025年5月26日中共中央修订　2025年5月26日中共中央办公厅发布） 　　第一条　为了规范党组讨论和决定党员处分事项，根据《中国共产党党组工作条例》、《中国共产党处分违纪党员批准权限和程序规定》，制定本规定。 　　第二条　坚持用改革精神和严的标准管党治党，落实党组（含党组性质党委，下同）全面从严治党主体责任，强化纪检监察机关派驻机构（以下简称派驻机构）监督职责，始终以严的基调、严的措施、严的氛围纵深推进正风肃纪反腐。 　　第三条　对党组管理的人员中的党员实施党纪处分，党组、纪委监委派出的纪检监察工委（以下简称派出机构）、派驻机构等应当按照规定权限和程序履行职责，加强协调沟通，有序顺畅衔接，形成工作合力，实现政治效果、纪法效果和社会效果有机统一。 　　第四条　党组讨论

translation.title: The Central Office of the Communist Republic of China issues the Regulations on the working procedures for the discussion and decision of party membership matters
translation.summary: In recent days, the Central Office of the Communist Party of China (CPC) issued a circular on working procedures for discussion and decision-making on party membership matters by Xinhua on 5 June in Beijing, and issued a circular requiring all regional departments to comply with it in good faith. The text of the Working Procedures Provisions for the Discussion and Decision of the Members of the Party Groups is reproduced below. Article 1 of the working procedures for the discussion and decision of party membership matters (approved by the Central Office of the Chinese Communist Party on 29 November 2018 and issued by the Central Office of the Chinese Communist Party on 29 November 2018 and revised by the Central Office of the Chinese Communist Party on 26 May 2025) lays down the present rules for the discussion and decision of party membership matters, in accordance with the Regulations on the Work of the Chinese Communist Party Group and the Regulations on the Approval of Competences and Procedures for the Punishment of Disciplinary Violations by the Chinese Communist Party. (b) To apply the spirit of reform and strict criteria to govern the party, to ensure that the party group (including the party committee of its nature, together with the other party members) is fully accountable to the party ' s principals, to strengthen the monitoring role of the monitoring and oversight bodies (hereinafter referred to as the accredited bodies) and to promote a culture of discipline and anti-corruption with a strict tone, strict measures and strict atmosphere. Article 3 imposes party disciplinary sanctions on members of the party ' s group management, and the inspection and inspection committee (hereinafter referred to as the sent-in agency) appointed by the party ' s team, the disciplinary committee (hereinafter referred to as the sent-in agency) and the accredited body, among others, shall perform their duties in accordance with the established competencies and procedures, enhance coordination and communication, establish an orderly and smooth line of communication and work together to achieve political, disciplinary and social coherence. items.title: 全国人大常委会启动节约能源法执法检查
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 为推动节约能源法全面有效实施，促进更高水平、更高质量做好节能工作，全国人大常委会5日启动节约能源法执法检查。 节约能源法自1998年1月1日实施，并于2007年、2016年、2018年进行了修改。 记者5日从全国人大常委会节约能源法执法检查组第一次全体会议上了解到，为全面深入了解法律实施情况，此次执法检查采取实地检查与委托检查相结合的方式，检查组将赴天津、江苏、湖南、广东、广西、四川等省（区、市）开展实地检查，并委托北京、河北、山西、吉林、上海、重庆等省（市）人大常委会对本行政区域内节约能源法实施情况进行检查。检查组将采取实地检查、听取汇报、组织座谈、典型调研、专题研究、抽查暗访等多种方式，全面准确了解法律实施情况，对带有普遍性的问题深入调查研究。 检查组将重点检查8方面内容：落实节能管理制度情况，推进重点领域节能工作情况，重点用能单位节能管理情况，推动节能技术进步情况，实施节能激励措施情况，与法律配套的行政法规、部门规章以及地方性法规的制定情况，法律实施中存在的其他问题，对节约能源法修改的意见和建议。

translation.title: The Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress initiated an energy-saving law enforcement inspection
translation.summary: In order to promote the full and effective implementation of the Energy Conservation Act and to promote higher and higher-quality energy efficiency, the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress launched an energy conservation law enforcement inspection on 5 June. The Energy Conservation Act has been in force since 1 January 1998 and was amended in 2007, 2016 and 2018. On 5 May, journalists learned from the first plenary meeting of the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress ' s Standing Committee on Energy Conservation Law Enforcement Inspection Unit that, in order to obtain a comprehensive and in-depth understanding of the implementation of the law, the inspection took the form of a combination of on-site inspections and commissioned inspections, which will be carried out in the provinces (districts and municipalities) of Tianjin, Jiangsu, Hunan, Guangdong, Guangxi, Sichuan and Beijing, Hebei, Shanxi, Jilin, Shanghai and Chongqing, among others. The Unit will have a comprehensive and accurate understanding of the implementation of the law and will conduct in-depth research and studies on issues of a general nature, in a variety of ways, including on-site inspections, debriefings, organization of talks, typical research, thematic studies, spot-checking and unannounced visits. The Unit will focus on eight areas: implementation of energy-saving management systems; promotion of energy-saving efforts in priority areas; focus on energy-saving management in energy-use units; promotion of technological progress in energy-saving; implementation of energy-saving incentives; development of administrative, sectoral and local regulations in conjunction with the law; other issues in the implementation of the law; and suggestions and recommendations for changes to the energy-saving law.
